description: CompositionRed and green printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, red tape border and stitch detailing along the neckline, slightly gathered from the neck, short slightly puffed sleeves and a vented hem FitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm ironInspired by traditional Indian prints and crafted with a classic cut, this kurta from vishudh makes a fabulous addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The gathered neckline and the puffed sleeves add zing and femininity to the garment. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
